measurement_note: Size is N, the number of roads. One dynamic-programming pass computes every skip count in O(N^2) time. A correct implementation that reruns an O(NK) feasibility DP for each candidate skip limit K completes all tiers and fails only by O(N^3) scaling.

cases.name: benchmark: all 11 rests must be skipped across 12 roads
benchmark: all 23 rests must be skipped across 24 roads
benchmark: all 47 rests must be skipped across 48 roads
